languageSetup.title: Choose your language
languageSetup.subtitle: You can change this later in Settings.
languageSetup.confirmBody: Menus will use this language. Tips and explanations will also start in this language (you can change them separately later).
onboarding.title: Welcome
onboarding.introBody: Short lessons. You are learning English - we only use your language to explain.
onboarding.helpQuestion: What do you want help with most?
onboarding.shellSubtitle: No IPA first. We shape pronunciation by imitation.
onboarding.step1Body: Start by hearing a natural sample.
onboarding.step2Body: Say what you hear, not what spelling suggests.
onboarding.step3Body: Use small feedback to improve each try.
home.title: Eigo Copy Coach
home.shellSubtitle: Start today's pronunciation with only 3 words.
home.quickPracticeBody: Keep it short: listen, copy, then adjust a little.
home.habitBody: We gradually fix reading habits like nai-fu / is-land / com-for-ta-ble.
settings.title: Settings
settings.supportLanguageDesc: Tips, pronunciation guidance, and help text.
settings.resetLanguageSetupDesc: Show the first language selection flow again.
settings.fullResetDesc: Reset language setup and onboarding, then start from the first screen.
practiceList.title: Today's practice
practiceList.subtitle: Start with 3 words. Short and daily.
practiceList.lessonBody: Practice words that are easy to pronounce in katakana style.
review.title: Review
review.subtitle: Your difficult words and sounds will collect here.
review.emptyBody: After practice, words and sounds you want to retry will appear here.
settings.shellSubtitle: Manage language, notifications, microphone status, and more.
review.body: Review queue and spaced repetition will appear here.
